name: Output Processing & Display
description: Processes and renders streaming AI output including ANSI stripping, subtask result injection, and tab management. Manages per-task output tabs in the UI and handles typewriter animations.

Managers/OutputProcessor.cs.content:
class OutputProcessor
  InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void

Managers/OutputTabManager.cs.content:
class OutputTabManager
  CreateTab(AgentTask task) -> void
  CreateGeminiTab(AgentTask task, string imageFolder) -> void
  AddGeminiImage(string taskId, string imagePath) -> void
  CloseTab(AgentTask task) -> void
  UpdateTabHeader(AgentTask task) -> void
  StopTypewriterAnimation(string taskId) -> void
  HasTab(string taskId) -> bool
  GetTab(string taskId) -> TabItem?
  GetOutputBox(string taskId) -> RichTextBox?
  EnsureOverflowButton() -> void
  UpdateOutputTabWidths() -> void

patterns: Lazy tab recreation for restarted tasks
Tab created per task, closed on completion
dependencies: AgentTask for task identity and output buffer
FormatHelpers for ANSI and path normalization
